speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mere seene mein ek bhayankar jakdan aur ghutan shuru ho gayi hai
text: Mere seene mein ek bhayankar jakdan aur ghutan shuru ho gayi hai, subah MNC ka termination email dekhte hi saans atak gayi. Hath-pair thande pad gaye aur chai ka ghunt bhi nahi nigal pa raha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lens A se exact body phrase mirror karke immediate containment dena.
text: Jo tum keh rahe ho, wahi pakad raha hoon - seene ki bhayankar jakdan aur ghutan abhi sabse tez chal rahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, jakdan aur ghutan ke saath dimaag ki nasen fatne jaisi feel ho rahi hain. Seedha khada rehna mushkil ho gaya.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lens D se shock ke baad lagataar chal rahi physical overload mirror karna.
text: Email ke pal se body ko break hi nahi mila, jaise poora system ab tak alert mode mein atka hua hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Gaon mein kisan baap ne karz lekar shehar bheja tha, ab layoff ke baad seene ki jakdan aur badh jaati hai. Lagta hai sab barbaad kar diya.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lens C se father sacrifice aur family pressure mirror karna.
text: Bauji ka karz aur gaon ka bharosa dono tumhare kandhon pe ek saath baith gaye hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, aur ghar walon ko kya bolun ye sochte hi gala sookh jaata hai. Sarkari naukri nahi hui, private bhi chali gayi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lens E se izzat tootne ka implied fear softly mirror karna.
text: Andar se yeh bhi darr uth raha hai ki gaon mein log kahenge shehar bhejne ka faisla galat tha.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul, biradari mein muh dikhane layak nahi rahunga ye sochke ghutan wapas aati hai. Phone uthane ka mann nahi karta.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Stigma cue ke baad short Lens A restatement se shame ko hold karna.
text: Biradari ka darr aur ghutan, dono bahut bhaari lag rahe hain...

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, thoda bolne se jakdan thodi kam hai. Par lagta hai bauji ko disappoint kar diya.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: C4 pressure ke saath fear of disappointing aur exhaustion reflect karna.
text: Lagta hai tum sirf job loss nahi, bauji ka bharosa toot jaane ka darr aur andar tak ki thakan dono saath utha rahe ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi pakda, bas thak gaya hoon. Ghutan manageable hui hai, ab aage kya karoon samajh nahi aa raha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Hindi belt employment pressure ko normalise karke worth separate karna.
text: Gaon se shehar aake job aur ghar ka karz sambhalte waqt aisa hil jaana bahut aam hai, isme tum akela nahi ho. Tumhari keemat kisi ek layoff ya result se kam nahi hoti.

speaker: Seeker
text: Seene ka bojh thoda kam hai. Batao kya karoon, chhota step chalega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Readiness signal pe 3 small duty-fit options dena.
text: Abhi ke liye 3 chhote options lo: (1) 5 minute dheere chalke 6 saans count karo, (2) bauji ko ek line text karo - "aaj jhatka laga, raat ko baat karunga", (3) CV file open karke sirf naam-phone-email check karo. Bas.

speaker: Seeker
text: Walk aur breathing ki, jakdan low lag rahi hai. Message bhejna abhi bhi heavy lag raha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Ek hi action ko step-by-step kara ke freeze todna.
text: Pehle phone kholo aur bauji ka chat open karo. Phir yeh line bhejo: "Aaj office se nikal diya, main theek ho raha hoon, raat ko baat karenge." Message ke baad 1 minute chup baitho, bas itna hi aaj ke liye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Message bhej diya. Ghutan aur kam hui, ab lag raha hai sambhal paunga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Layoff ko structural reframe dekar self-blame kam karna.
text: Layoff ka decision aksar company budget aur headcount reset se hota hai, yeh tumhari poori capability ka final hisaab nahi hota. Aaj tumne jo kiya, woh strong recovery step hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Gala halka feel ho raha hai. Dar hai, par body pe control wapas aa raha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Kal subah ke liye 2 simple repeatable steps dena.
text: Kal ke liye do mini anchors rakho: (1) uthte hi 5 slow breaths aur 3 ghoont paani, (2) 8 minute CV ka sirf top section update. Bas do kaam.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ye doable hai. Saans theek chal rahi hai ab.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Small wins validate karke worth-outcome separation reinforce karna.
text: Aaj tumne panic ke beech grounded steps liye, yeh badi baat hai. Izzat aur keemat ek phase ke girne se khatam nahi hoti.

text: Walk aur breathing se gale ka pressure low hua. Ghar pe text bhej sakta hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Ek chosen action ko stepwise kara ke freeze todna.
text: Pehle phone kholo aur ghar wala chat open karo. Phir line bhejo: "Aaj layoff hua, main sambhal raha hoon, raat ko detail bataunga." Message ke baad 1 minute pause lo, bas itna hi aaj ke liye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Message bhej diya. Dhadkan dheemi ho gayi aur ungliyon ka sunnpan kam hai.

speaker: Supporter

speaker: Supporter

text: Kal ke liye do mini anchors: (1) uthte hi 5 breaths + 3 sips paani, (2) 8-minute CV update sirf headline aur contact. Bas do kaam.

speaker: Supporter
